exploration_notes: Fixed Widget.build_attrs() in django/forms/widgets.py to HTML-escape attribute values using conditional_escape(). The method now: (1) filters out None values instead of passing them through, (2) preserves boolean values as-is for boolean HTML attributes, (3) escapes all other values using conditional_escape which handles quotes, ampersands, angle brackets, and avoids double-escaping SafeString values. The flatatt() function in utils.py was already properly secured via format_html_join.
